intro: We are actively recruiting talented and motivated researchers at all levels. Our lab offers a collaborative, rigorous, and supportive environment at the intersection of physics, computation, and clinical impact.

positions.title: PhD Student (Fall 2025 / Spring 2026)
positions.description: We are seeking PhD students with backgrounds in biomedical engineering, computer science, medical physics, or a related field. Strong programming skills (Python) and interest in medical imaging are required. Experience with deep learning or CT simulation is a plus.
requirements: BS/MS in BME, CS, Physics, or related field

positions.title: Postdoctoral Researcher
positions.description: We seek a postdoc with expertise in deep learning for medical imaging, ideally with experience in generative models, foundation models, or CT simulation. The postdoc will lead independent research projects and co-mentor graduate students.
requirements: PhD in CS, BME, Medical Physics, or related

positions.title: MS Student / Research Assistant
positions.description: Current UA graduate students interested in joining the lab for thesis research or as research assistants are encouraged to reach out.

positions.title: Undergraduate Researcher
positions.description: Exceptional UA undergraduates interested in research can apply for part-time positions. Commitment of at least 10 hours/week is expected.

how_to_apply: Send an email to ftushar@arizona.edu with subject line '[Position] – Your Name'. Include your CV, a brief statement of research interests (1 page), and any relevant code samples or publications.
